text:
Name of Practice CHAR 100
GROUP_TYPE Practice Group Type CHAR 100
CCNS List of CMS Certification Numbers (Facility Numbers) for the Practice CHAR 4000
ADDRESS_LINE_1 Practice's Address (line 1) CHAR 100
ADDRESS_LINE_2 Practice's Address (line 2) CHAR 100
CITY Practice's City CHAR 100
STATE Practice's State (postal abbreviation) CHAR 2
ZIP_CODE Practice's Zip Code CHAR 20
INSERT_DATE Date the Record was Created DATE 8
UPDATE_DATE Date the Record was Modified DATE 8
IS_ACTIVE Active Practice (Y)
